about.meta_description: Learn about VALE: the verified business directory that connects the best local businesses with their customers.
about.hero_title: The directory that connects businesses with people
about.hero_subtitle: VALE was built to make finding trusted services effortless. We verify every business so you don't have to worry.
about.mission_p1: At VALE we believe finding a great business shouldn't be complicated. That's why we built a clear, honest, verified directory where businesses stand out for their quality and users find exactly what they're looking for.
about.mission_p2: We work with local businesses to help them grow digitally without the hassle — a complete profile, verified reviews, and direct visibility to their potential customers.
about.values_subtitle: Four principles that guide every decision we make.
about.value1_desc: Every business on VALE is manually reviewed before appearing in the directory. No fake profiles or outdated information.
about.value2_desc: We only publish reviews with proof of service. Users upload their receipt and our team validates it before publishing.
about.value3_desc: We prioritize local and small businesses. Our tools are designed so any business can have a digital presence.
about.value4_desc: Find what you're looking for in 2-3 clicks. No unnecessary sign-ups, no intrusive ads, no noise.
about.biz_desc: Create your free profile, receive verified reviews, and appear in the directory. Paid plans give you extra visibility and a featured position in results.
about.contact_desc: Write to us and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

home.hero_subtitle: The most complete directory of verified businesses in your city.
home.categories_empty: Categories will appear once the database is configured.
home.how_subtitle: Finding the perfect business has never been easier.
home.step1_desc: Type what you need or filter by category and city.
home.step2_desc: Review profiles, photos, prices and ratings for each business.
home.step3_desc: Call, message via WhatsApp, or visit their website directly.
home.featured_subtitle: The highest-rated businesses in the directory.
home.cta_title: Own a business? Reach more customers
home.cta_subtitle: Create your free profile in minutes and connect with thousands of people looking for what you offer.
home.perk1: Free profile with no time limit
home.perk2: Appear in searches by category and city
home.perk3: Customers contact you directly via WhatsApp
home.perk4: Control panel to manage your information
home.testimonial_quote: Since joining VALE, I get twice as many inquiries. It's the best investment I've made for my business.

privacy.meta_description: Learn how VALE collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At VALE we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how you can control it.
privacy.s1_body: We collect information you provide directly when registering (name, email address), when creating or managing your business profile, and when leaving reviews. We also automatically collect technical data such as IP address and usage data to improve the service.
privacy.s2_body:
We use your information to:
• Provide and improve VALE's services
• Manage your account and business profile
• Send notifications about your account or subscription
• Moderate content and prevent fraud
• Communicate with you when necessary
privacy.s3_body: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share data with service providers who help us operate the platform (cloud storage, email delivery), always under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacy.s4_body: We use essential cookies for the platform to function (authentication and language preferences). We do not use third-party advertising tracking cookies.
privacy.s5_body: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including secure authentication with encrypted tokens and HTTPS connections. No system is completely infallible, but we strive to maintain the highest standards.
privacy.s6_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. You can do so from your user panel or by contacting us directly.
privacy.s7_body: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes by email or through a prominent notice on the platform.
privacy.contact_body: For any questions about this privacy policy, write to us at:

terms.meta_description: Read the terms and conditions of use for the VALE platform.
terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By accessing and using VALE you agree to these terms of use. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
terms.s1_body: VALE is a verified business directory. You may use the platform to search for businesses, leave verified reviews, and, if you are a business owner, to manage your profile. Fraudulent use, posting false content, or impersonation is strictly prohibited.
terms.s2_body: To leave reviews or manage a business you need an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and all activities that occur under your account. Notify us immediately if you detect unauthorized use.
terms.s3_body: Reviews must be honest and based on a real experience. VALE requires proof of service to publish a review. We reserve the right to remove content that violates these rules or is defamatory, offensive, or illegal.
terms.s4_body: Business owners are responsible for the accuracy of information published on their profile. VALE reserves the right to verify, edit, or remove profiles containing incorrect or misleading information.
terms.s5_body: Paid plans are managed manually. Once payment is confirmed by the VALE team, the plan is activated within the agreed timeframe. No refunds are offered except in cases of error attributable to VALE.
terms.s6_body: VALE acts as an intermediary and is not responsible for transactions or agreements between users and businesses. Information on profiles is provided by the businesses themselves. We recommend always verifying information before hiring a service.
terms.contact_body: If you have any questions about these terms, contact us at:
